section.heading: Reports
section.chapeau: An entity that receives a grant under this subchapter during a fiscal year shall submit to the Attorney General, not later than a date specified by the Attorney General, a report that describes and evaluates the effectiveness of that program during such fiscal year that—

paragraph.content: is based on evidence-based data; and
uses the methods and measurements described in the application of that entity for purposes of evaluating that program.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 90–351, title I, § 2925, as added Pub. L. 110–199, title I, § 113, Apr. 9, 2008, 122 Stat. 676.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 3797s–4 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Construction of 2008 Amendment
note.p: For construction of amendments by Pub. L. 110–199 and requirements for grants made under such amendments, see section 60504 of this title.
